blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the persona scenario regarding multiple waitlist priorities. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that the scenario behavior has been confirmed or that a clear, actionable failure report has been produced. The expected result indicates a need for concrete validation outcomes, which are not present in the current evidence, leading to an inconclusive status.
